prompt:
Use case: sketch-to-render
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: turn this Children of Prophecy concept into a clean runtime battle sprite for the Aevum Guardian
Subject: the same ascetic psychic warrior with a broad conical hat, bare upper torso, long pilgrim trousers, and a long polearm or rifle-staff weapon
Style/medium: moody post-apocalyptic tactics sprite illustration, painterly pixel-art-inspired, readable at small scale
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, grounded stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: dry prophetic wasteland mood with restrained contrast
Color palette: sun-faded sand, bone white, ember red, dusty umber
Constraints: preserve the concept silhouette, preserve the hat and weapon language, derive directly from the provided concept art, rendered around 104px tall in game, large readable shapes, simplified fine detail, no floor, no scenery, no text
Avoid: extra characters, extra props, glow spam, photorealism, anime gloss, cinematic background
